item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-020","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly separates the user's local advantage (more refined manual editing) from the stated growth objective of 100k followers in a year, shifting evaluation toward repeatability, frequency, topic testing, and account positioning. It directly identifies production cost and inability to replicate hits as the bottleneck, rather than merely saying quality matters. The verdict is committed and practical: keep manual quality as a differentiator, but do not run the account as a fully manual workflow."}
